scripts.build: npm run subset-font && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && vite build && cp dist/index.html dist/404.html
scripts.build:gh-pages: tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && vite build && cp dist/index.html dist/404.html
scripts.subset-font: npx tsx scripts/extract-resume-chars.ts > scripts/resume-chars.txt && npx tsx scripts/subset-font.ts
